description: Synthetic HL7 v2.4 QRY^R02 worklist/order-download host-query from an EDAN H99S/H90-series analyzer. The analyzer asks the host for orders for barcode DEV01260000000000002 (QRD-8, QRD-9 = OTH) and expects an ORF^R04 answer with MSH-16=3 carrying PID/OBR order rows. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-149 / DEC-06 H99S order-download - EDAN H90 LIS Communication Protocol, QRY^R02 / ORF^R04 worklist profile)
source.note: Application payload only (no MLLP framing). QRD-8 carries the analyzer barcode DEV01260000000000002; the host response may return the reconciled OpenELIS accession 2 in OBR-2/3. Replace with real H99S bench wire capture before treating this as signed conformance evidence.
